entry.title: IDC 70B01C20D00000004 (P00080) awarded to WORKWEAR OUTFITTERS, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Orders may be placed using standard delivery orders or through the use of a purchase card.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO ADD ITEMS TO THE FAMS ITEMS LIST.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MEN'S AND BOYS' CLOTHING AND FURNISHINGS MERCHANT WHOLESALERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
